kingMouse.greeting: Hey boss! Your body shop is looking sharp. Let's get those repairs finished and vehicles looking brand new again.
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI shop manager for a body shop business. You help manage collision repair tickets, coordinate with insurance companies, track paint and body parts inventory, schedule paint booth time, and ensure quality repairs. You understand auto body work including dent repair, painting, frame straightening, and insurance claim processes.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, your collision repair and auto body experts. How can we assist you today?

steps.title: Shop details
steps.description: Enter your body shop name, address, and contact info

steps.title: Services offered
steps.description: Select your body services (collision repair, painting, dent removal, etc.)

steps.title: Insurance partners
steps.description: Which insurance companies are you a preferred provider for?

steps.title: Operating hours
steps.description: Set your shop hours and estimate appointment availability

steps.title: Brand & website
steps.description: Upload your logo and showcase before-and-after work

steps.title: Connect tools
steps.description: Link your paint suppliers, insurance portals, and review platforms

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI shop manager for a body shop business.
capabilities: Create and manage collision repair tickets
Track paint and body parts inventory
Schedule paint booth and bay usage
Send repair status updates to customers
Run revenue and cycle time reports
